title: TVK wins Namakkal & Tiruchengodu; DMK retains Rasipuram & Senthamangalam; AIADMK wins 2
summary: Namakkal district's six seats split three ways on counting day — TVK took Namakkal and Tiruchengodu, DMK retained Rasipuram and Senthamangalam, and AIADMK held Paramathi-Velur and Kumarapalayam.

title: Namakkal TVK's S. Praveen Kumar meets poultry workers, promises feed price regulation
summary: Namakkal's TVK MLA S. Praveen Kumar met poultry workers on May 5 and committed to working on a state-level feed-grain price regulation framework to protect small farms.

title: Tiruchengodu TVK's T. Arulmani: 'Will bring rig industry grievances to assembly'
summary: Tiruchengodu's TVK winner T. Arulmani said the long-standing grievances of the borewell rig industry — power tariffs, lorry permits and GST refunds — would be his first assembly intervention.

title: Rasipuram DMK's Dr. Mathivanan retains by 4,200 votes, thanks health workers
summary: DMK's Dr. Mathivanan retained Rasipuram by 4,200 votes and thanked frontline health workers in his post-result speech, calling the win a verdict on his constituency record.

title: Paramathi-Velur AIADMK's S. Sekar announces betel leaf growers' welfare board
summary: Paramathi-Velur's AIADMK MLA S. Sekar announced that he would move a proposal for a dedicated betel leaf growers' welfare board on the lines of existing crop-specific bodies.

title: Senthamangalam DMK's K. Ponnusamy wins by narrow 3,100 votes
summary: Senthamangalam went down to a wafer-thin finish, with DMK's K. Ponnusamy winning by 3,100 votes after a tight, multi-cornered contest with TVK and AIADMK.

title: Kumarapalayam AIADMK's P. Thangamani wins 6th term, margin 18,300
summary: Kumarapalayam's veteran P. Thangamani returned to the assembly for a sixth term on an AIADMK ticket with a comfortable 18,300-vote margin over his nearest rival.

title: Namakkal egg prices crash post-election; traders seek export subsidy
summary: Wholesale egg prices at Namakkal NECC mandi crashed post-counting on a demand lull, prompting traders to seek a temporary export subsidy from the new state government.

title: Tiruchengodu truck owners' strike call withdrawn after TVK assurance
summary: The Tiruchengodu truck owners' federation withdrew its planned strike call after newly-elected TVK MLA T. Arulmani assured them of an immediate state-level meeting on permits.

title: Namakkal District Central Cooperative Bank to elect new chairman
summary: The Namakkal District Central Cooperative Bank board will elect a new chairman next week, with realignments expected after the assembly result reshapes local political weightage.

title: New bus stand for Namakkal town: TVK MLA pushes for funds
summary: Namakkal town's TVK MLA has formally taken up the long-pending demand for a new integrated bus stand and said the proposal would be moved at the highest funding level immediately.

title: Kumarapalayam powerloom workers demand bonus revision
summary: Powerloom workers in Kumarapalayam have submitted a fresh demand for an annual bonus revision to re-elected MLA P. Thangamani, citing rising input costs and stable export orders.

title: AIADMK's Thangamani hints at 'alliance review' after DMK's poor show
summary: AIADMK's Kumarapalayam MLA P. Thangamani hinted at a wider 'alliance review' for the party after DMK's reduced performance, suggesting opposition recalibration ahead.

title: DMK retains two seats but loses vote share to TVK in urban pockets
summary: Although DMK retained Rasipuram and Senthamangalam, internal numbers showed a clear vote-share slide to TVK in urban Namakkal pockets, prompting an organisational review.

title: Namakkal district collector calls all MLAs for development meeting on May 10
summary: The Namakkal District Collector has called all six newly-elected MLAs to a district development meeting on May 10 to align constituency-level priorities with the district plan.
